description: The girls knee high socks are designed with matching silky ribbon bow on the side of the socks. These knee-high school socks with bow are the perfect pair to be worn not just under frocks and other dresses but can act as a multi-purpose use to complete little girls school uniform socks essentials. Pack of 3 Pairs available in four different (Black, Navy, White and Grey) Colours. These white, Navy, Black and Grey bow socks defy all shabby looks and ensure that when worn they look chic and fantastic! 3 pairs in 4 different colours at the most affordable Price and our aim is to do just that, to make you shopping easier and hassle free. These machines washable (at 40 degrees) knee socks are easy to handle and clean. They have the perfect blend of cotton and Lycra
